steps.title: Find the dash pair
steps.content: The sentence opens a parenthetical interruption with an em dash after “that.” The interruption is “through community involvement and scientific study,” and then the main clause resumes with “aim to bring.”

steps.title: Close the interruption
steps.content: Choice A uses a comma, Choice C uses a colon, and Choice D leaves the opening dash unmatched. A second em dash is needed after “study” to close the parenthetical phrase. The answer is B.
